rows.title: Privacy Policy
rows.heading: Privacy Policy
rows.content:
Basic Terminology

This Privacy Policy is an electronic document in accordance with the Information Technology Act, 2000, and the rules established under it. It is generated automatically by a computer system and does not require any physical or digital signatures.

At InstaFarms (“VWA Hospitality Pvt Ltd”), we prioritize the trust that visitors to our website and users of our services place in us. Therefore, we adhere to the highest standards for secure transactions and the privacy of customer information. We are committed to protecting any information you provide to us as a user. This Privacy Policy explains the information we collect from you during the normal course of our services and how it may be used. By accessing or using this website, you explicitly agree to the collection and use of your personal information as outlined in this Privacy Policy. This policy is incorporated into and governed by the Terms and Conditions of Use.

Please note that this Privacy Policy may be updated or modified without prior notice to visitors or users of the website. We recommend that you regularly review this policy for any changes.

Insta Farms is a brand owned by Insta Farms Private Limited, and the following privacy policy applies to it.

The Information Collected By Us

Typically, you can browse this website without disclosing any personal information. However, if you wish to make reservations through our website, we will need certain details such as your name, contact number, email address, billing information, bank account details, and other personal information.

Whenever possible, we specify whether the requested information is optional or mandatory, and you always have the option to withhold information by choosing not to use a particular service or feature on the website.

We ask that you provide accurate and truthful information. We are not responsible for verifying the authenticity of the personal information or data provided by users and any inconvenience that may result from inaccuracies.

Based on your usage of our services and behavior on this website, we may automatically collect certain information about you, including but not limited to your IP address location. We use this information to conduct internal research on our users’ demographics, interests, and behaviors to better understand, protect, and serve our users. We also track customer traffic patterns and website usage to enhance the services we offer. Rest assured, we will only collect information that is necessary and relevant for providing the services available on our website

Personal Information

Personal Information refers to data that we may collect from you that can be used to identify you, including:

a) Name and Gender

b) Phone Number

c) Email Address

d) Contact Address

e) Password

f) Financial information such as bank account details, credit or debit card information, or other payment instrument details needed for processing payments

g) Physical, physiological, and mental health condition h) Other details such as biometric information, sexual orientation, medical records, and history

Please note: Your financial information is managed, stored, and processed by a third-party Payment Gateway, specifically PayU and JusPay, whose registered office is in Gurgaon. PayU and JusPay are legally bound to maintain the confidentiality of your financial information under applicable laws and our agreement with them. However, we are not responsible for any actions by these third-party Payment Gateways that may breach their confidentiality obligations or result in the disclosure of your financial information. If you are a frequent guest at our properties, it is your responsibility to notify us if any of your personal information needs to be updated. If we suspect any issue regarding a booking made by you, we may contact you at any time.

Cookies

"Cookies" are small files stored on your hard drive that help us deliver our services. We use cookies on specific pages of the website to analyze page traffic, measure the effectiveness of promotions, and enhance security. Cookies allow us to provide content that aligns with your interests. They also enable your browser to remember user-specific information, reducing the need to re-enter your password during a session. Most cookies are session-based and are automatically removed from your hard drive when the session ends.

You can choose to disable cookies if your browser allows it , but doing so may limit your ability to use certain features on this website, and you may need to re-enter your password more often during a session.

Occasionally, you may encounter cookies or similar data collection tools on certain pages of our website that are placed by third parties. We do not control the use of these third-party cookies.

Offers And Updates

By providing your email address during the reservation process, you consent to receiving communications from us regarding offers and updates related to the website and our services. To better understand how you use our services, we may monitor which website features you utilize most frequently. This helps us tailor the information we display on the website and in our communications to be more relevant and useful to you. If you no longer wish to receive these communications, you can opt out or unsubscribe at any time by selecting the unsubscribe option on our website or following the link provided in our emails.

Use Of The Information Collected By Us

We assure you that your personal information is used only as necessary and appropriate in the normal course of our business.

We utilize your personal information to process your reservation on the website, enhance our services, contact you by phone or email when needed, and assist you. We may also share your information with trusted third parties if required.

Additionally, this information may be used to communicate with you about your reservation and other services available on our website.

We may use your personal information to resolve disputes, address issues, gauge consumer interest in our services, inform you about both online and offline offers, services, and updates, customize your experience, and detect and prevent errors, fraud, and other criminal activities. It is also used to enforce our Terms and Conditions of Use and for other purposes disclosed at the time of collection. Moreover, we may use this information to enhance our marketing and promotional efforts, analyze website usage, and improve and tailor the website’s content, design, and services. These measures help us to refine the website and provide you with a smooth, efficient, safe, and personalized experience while using our website.

Your Information May Be Shared With Third Parties

Your information may be shared with third parties under the following conditions:

1. **Service Providers:** When trusted third parties (such as our accountants, credit card processors, hotels, or government officials) perform services for us or for you, we may share your information with them only to the extent necessary for them to carry out those services.

2. **Business Changes:** If our company undergoes reorganization, sale, or lease, the new entity or owner will inherit the rights we hold regarding your information. We will ensure that your privacy continues to be protected by obtaining reasonable assurances from the new entity.

3. **Legal and Security Issues:** We may need to disclose your information to investigate or address illegal activities, suspected fraud, threats to safety or security, unauthorized use of our website, or violations of our terms and conditions.
This includes: - Responding to legal processes such as summons or court orders. - Enforcing the Terms and Conditions of Use or this Privacy Policy. - Cooperating with authorized agencies for interception, monitoring, or decryption as per the Information Technology (Procedure and Safeguards for Interception, Monitoring and Decryption of Information) Rules, 2009. - Assisting with the monitoring and collection of traffic data in accordance with the Information Technology (Procedure and Safeguard for Monitoring and Collecting Traffic Data or Information) Rules, 2009.

4. **Internal Service Providers:** We may use third-party service providers to assist with certain business functions. Your personal information may be shared with these providers to facilitate their work. These providers are bound by confidentiality agreements and legal restrictions to use your information solely for the intended purpose, unless you have given explicit consent for additional uses. In line with this policy, we will only share your personal information with your consent, or as required by law, including court orders.

Disclosure Of Information

**Advertisements:** The website may feature advertisements from third parties. When you provide information to any advertiser on this site, that information is collected both by us and by the advertiser. We use the information according to the terms of this Privacy Policy, while the advertiser uses it in line with their own privacy policy. Since we do not control the privacy practices of these advertisers or third parties, we recommend that you review their privacy policies before sharing any information with them. We are not responsible for any information you provide to or that is collected by these advertisers.

**Links to Other Sites:** The website may include links to other websites that may gather information about you. We are not liable for the privacy practices or content of these linked sites.

Protecting Your Information

We are dedicated to safeguarding the information you provide. We have implemented a range of security measures, including managerial, technical, and physical safeguards, to ensure your data is protected. For example, we use encryption to secure sensitive information during transmission between your system and ours, and we restrict access to your personal information to authorized personnel only for approved business functions.

Security Measures


 In furtherance of the confidentiality with which we treat your information, we assure you that to prevent unauthorized access, maintain data accuracy, and ensure correct use of information, we will employ reasonable security practices and procedures and current Internet security methods and technologies in compliance with the Information Technology Act, 2000 and rules made there under.

Moreover, we restrict access to your personal information to our employees, contractors and agents who need to know that information in order to operate, develop or improve our services. These individuals are bound by confidentiality obligations and may be subject to discipline, including termination and criminal prosecution, if they fail to meet these obligations.

Although we use industry standard practices to protect your privacy, we cannot ensure that all of your private communications and other personal information will never be disclosed in ways not otherwise described in this Privacy Policy. By way of example (without limiting the foregoing), we may be forced to disclose personal information to the government or third parties under certain circumstances, third parties may unlawfully intercept or access transmissions or private communications or users may abuse or misuse your personal information that they collect from the website.

Applicable Law And Jurisdiction

This website is developed and managed by InstaFarms and is subject to the laws of India. Any disputes related to the terms, conditions, and disclaimers will be exclusively handled by the courts in Hyderabad.

Changes To The Privacy Policy

We may revise this Privacy Policy as needed. Any updates will be published on this page. We recommend checking this page regularly to stay informed about the most current version of our policy.

Grievance Policy

Insta Farms is committed to maintaining transparency with its users. This policy is designed to reduce customer complaints, grievances, and dissatisfaction through a structured approach to review and resolution. If you are dissatisfied or have issues with the services provided by Insta Farms, you can file a grievance. You may submit your grievance via email or traditional mail to the Grievance Officer at StayVista. For email, send your concerns For postal mail, address your grievance to:

Special Note About Minors

Persons under the age of 18 are not eligible to use the accommodation reservation services on this website. Minors can normally accompany their parent(s) or legal custodian(s) who have booked an accommodation.

Using Mobile Phones And Tablet Apps

When using our app, information is gathered in the same manner and for the same reasons as when you use our website.
Additionally, we collect other types of information automatically through our Mobile Apps, including:

**App Usage Data:** We gather data on which features of the Mobile App you use. This helps us understand which areas are most interesting to our users. The data collected for this purpose does not enable us to personally identify you.

**Location Data:** If you permit the app to access your location via GPS or similar technologies, we can identify nearby hotels, airports, or other service providers. If you choose to share your location, this data may be recorded as part of search requests. You can disable location access at any time through your phone's settings menu.

**Error Reports:** If the Mobile App crashes or freezes, it sends us error reports to help us diagnose and fix the issue. These reports include information about your device type, version, UID, the time of the error, the feature being used, and the app's state at the time of the error. This data is used solely for troubleshooting and improving app stability.

You have control over the information you receive from the Mobile App. You can adjust these settings through the app’s settings menu or your device settings. Alternatively, you can uninstall the Mobile App and use our services exclusively through our website.

Express Consent

 By visiting this page or using this website, you explicitly agree to our use and disclosure of your personal information as outlined in this Privacy Policy and in compliance with Indian laws.

**Note:** Headings are provided for reference only and do not define, limit, interpret, or describe the scope or extent of the respective sections.

rows.title: Cancellation Policy
rows.heading: Cancellation Policy
rows.content:
All the properties listed on InstaFarms do not have the same cancellation policy. Every Property Owner would choose a cancellation policy that he/she deems fit to their requirement. For the exact cancellation policy of that property, pls visit the respective property page and read the cancellation policy of that particular property. In this page, we will give a brief overview of all the available cancellation policies.

To keep things smooth, we have created 4 standard cancellation policies and every property would adhere to one of these 4 standard cancellation types.

Flexible, Moderate, Firm & Strict.

Flexible: If you cancel your booking
3 days before the stay, you’ll get 50% refund.
More than 3 days before the stay, you’ll get 100% refund.


Moderate: If you cancel your booking   
1 day before the stay, you’ll get 0% refund.   
Less than 7 days before the stay, you’ll get 50% refund.    
More than 7 days before the stay, you’ll get 100% refund.

Firm: If you cancel your booking
Less than 7 days before the stay, you’ll get 0% refund.
Less than 14 days before the stay, you’ll get 50% refund.
More than 14 days before the stay, you’ll get 100% refund.

Strict: If you cancel your booking
Less than 7 days before the stay, you’ll get 0% refund.
Less than 14 days before the stay, you’ll get 50% refund.
Less than 30 days before the stay, you’ll get 75% refund.
More than 30 days before the stay, you’ll get 100% refund.
 
Also, each property can have 2 different cancellation policies for short term stays(<= 2 Nights) and long term stays(> 2 nights). For example, a property could have a Moderate Cancellation policy for short term stays and a Strict cancellation policy for long term stays.

So, pls check out the property page for the detailed cancellation policy of that property.

meta.metaTitle: Cancellation & Refund Policy | InstaFarms Booking Support
meta.metaDescription: Change of plans? InstaFarms offers a simple cancellation and refund policy for stress-free farmhouses bookings. Book confidently with flexible options!

rows.title: Our Story
rows.heading: Our Story
rows.content:
At InstaFarms, we believe that vacations are more than just trips—they are experiences that bring people together, create lasting memories, and offer a break from the ordinary. Our journey began with a simple idea: to make it easier for people to find the perfect vacation home, whether it’s for a relaxing getaway, a family reunion, or an intimate celebration.

The Beginning

InstaFarms was founded with a vision to redefine how people book vacation homes. Unlike traditional rental platforms, we focus exclusively on vacation homes—curated spaces designed for comfort, privacy, and unforgettable moments. Whether you're looking for a serene farmhouse, a cozy retreat, or a private villa close to the city, our platform connects you with handpicked properties that meet high-quality standards.

Why We Started

Many platforms were cluttered with listings that lacked transparency, quality control, and a seamless booking experience. We saw an opportunity to build a platform that puts people first—offering carefully vetted homes, a smooth reservation process, and a focus on experiences tailored to families, friends, and event hosts. Our goal is to provide easy access to getaway spaces within the city, making it simple to escape the everyday without having to travel far.

What Sets Us Apart

At InstaFarms, we don’t just provide stays—we curate experiences. Our properties are chosen to ensure they offer more than just accommodation. They are destinations in themselves, ideal for:

Families looking to bond and reconnect
Friends seeking the perfect getaway spot
Event hosts planning weddings, birthday parties, and special celebrations

We also emphasize personalized customer support, secure transactions, and an intuitive booking system that takes the hassle out of planning your stay.

Looking Ahead

Our journey is just getting started. As we continue to grow, we remain committed to expanding our network of premium vacation homes while enhancing our platform to make booking easier and more seamless. At InstaFarms, we’re not just offering a place to stay—we’re crafting experiences that bring people together.

Welcome to InstaFarms. Your perfect getaway home awaits!

meta.metaTitle: Our Story | Bringing Unique Farmhouses Experiences to You
meta.metaDescription: InstaFarms turns special moments into lasting memories! Book a farmhouses for family stays, events, and relaxing getaways — perfect for every occasion.

rows.title: Terms & Conditions
rows.heading: Terms & Conditions
rows.content:
Basic Terminology

 VWA Hospitality Limited (“InstaFarms”) offers a range of accommodations, including villas, bungalows, farmhouses, and homestays, all under the “InstaFarms” brand. The following Terms and Conditions apply to all guests or customers who book any of these properties or individual rooms via our website, mobile app, third-party websites, apps, or through travel agents/advertisements/referrals, collectively referred to as “Booking Channels.” Guests are required to read and understand these Terms and Conditions before making a booking through any of these channels. By making a booking, you agree to these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with them, please do not use the website or any Booking Channels to make a reservation. These Terms and Conditions may be updated by InstaFarms at any time without prior notice. Updated terms will be effective immediately upon posting. InstaFarms may also modify or enhance its services without notice. Therefore, you should regularly review these Terms and Conditions for any changes. Continued use of the website implies acceptance of any updates to the terms.

Unless additional terms and conditions are provided, these Terms and Conditions override all prior representations, agreements, or understandings and take precedence, even if they differ from other terms related to any order placed or service provided by InstaFarms.

For both online and offline bookings made through our platform, the terms in these Terms and Conditions are defined as follows:

(a) “Property/Properties” refers to villas, bungalows, farmhouses, and homestays available for booking through any Booking Channels.

(b) “Guest/Guests” denotes individuals, companies, or other entities interested in booking any of the Properties through any Booking Channels. In context, Guests may be addressed as "you" or "you're."

(c) “Booking” signifies a reservation made by a Guest for any Property for accommodation purposes.

(d) "Check-In" is the scheduled date and time by which Guests must complete all check-in formalities required by InstaFarms, after which they can begin using the reserved property.

(e) "Check-Out” refers to the scheduled date and time by which the Guest must vacate the Property after completing all required check-out formalities with InstaFarms.

(f) “Booking Period” represents the duration between the scheduled Check-In and the scheduled Check-Out.

(g) “Booking Amount” is the total amount payable by the Guest to InstaFarms to confirm the Booking through the registered payment method, as communicated by InstaFarms.

(h) “Booking Confirmation” is the communication shared by InstaFarms with the Guest upon receipt of the Advance (defined below), detailing the Booking, including Terms & Conditions, names and number of Guests, Check-In and Check-Out details, Property name, number of rooms, the Booking Amount payable, Security Deposit amount, and due dates for payment. InstaFarms is not obliged to serve a Booking unless the entire Booking Amount is paid by the Guest, even if a Booking Confirmation has been sent. The Booking Confirmation and proof of payment of the entire Booking Amount must be presented by Guests at Check-In.

(i) "Advance" is the non-refundable deposit required from Guests to secure a Booking for a Property.

(j) "Security Deposit" is an amount that may be required from Guests on a case-by-case basis, which InstaFarms may use for any damages caused to the Property or its contents by Guests or their pets, or to recover other charges imposed by InstaFarms.

(k) “Peak Days” include long weekends and festive dates such as Diwali, New Year's, Christmas, and similar occasions.

Acknowledgement and Express Consent

Your use of this website is governed by the Terms and Conditions of Use outlined here, along with the Privacy Policy and all other policies listed on the InstaFarms website. These terms and conditions form a binding agreement between you and InstaFarms regarding your use of this website and the services it offers. By accessing, viewing, browsing, caching, storing, or otherwise using our website or any of our services, applications, content, or functions through any platform, and by completing a Booking, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to all the terms and conditions on the website (including the Privacy Policy) and agree to be bound by them.

The pages of this website, the content and infrastructure on these pages, and the online accommodation reservation services provided through this website (“the Service/s") are owned, operated, and provided by instafarms.in and are intended for your personal, non-commercial use only, subject to the terms and conditions outlined below.

Eligibility

The use of our Booking Channels to make a reservation for a Property is restricted to individuals who can legally enter into binding contracts under the Indian Contract Act, 1872. Individuals deemed 'incompetent to contract' as per the Indian Contract Act, 1872, are not eligible to use our Booking Channels for making a reservation.

Access and Interference for Online Bookings

InstaFarms grants you a non-exclusive, non-transferable, limited permission to access and display the web pages of this website on your personal computer or other platforms. Failure to comply with the terms, conditions, and notices on this website will result in the automatic termination of any rights granted to you, without prior notice. Beyond the limited permission mentioned above, InstaFarms does not grant you any express or implied rights or licenses under any patents, trademarks, copyrights, or other proprietary or intellectual property rights. You may not copy any content from this website onto another website or any other media. You agree not to use any device, software, or routine to interfere with or attempt to interfere with the proper functioning of this website or any transactions conducted on this website. You confirm that you will not copy, reproduce, alter, modify, create derivative works from, or publicly display any content without our prior written consent.

The information you provide to us must not contain any viruses, such as Trojan horses, worms, time bombs, cancel bots, or other computer programming routines intended to damage, interfere with, intercept, or expropriate any system, data, or information.

Description of Services Provided by InstaFarms

InstaFarms functions as both an online and offline platform for booking Properties at affordable rates. It also provides information about these Properties. The availability of certain amenities or services at the Properties at any given time does not guarantee they will always be available, and InstaFarms reserves the right to discontinue any amenities or services at its discretion.

Accuracy of Content

InstaFarms has made every effort to ensure the accuracy of the content on its Booking Channels, website, and mobile application, particularly with regard to the rates quoted and the details displayed. You acknowledge that InstaFarms will not be held responsible for any typographical, technical, or other errors on the Booking Channels.

Additional Services

 To enhance the comfort of Guests, InstaFarms may, at its sole discretion and depending on availability, arrange additional services such as chefs, cleaners, or vehicle hire by outsourcing these services from third-party vendors at the prior request of Guests. Guests acknowledge that these services may not be included in the Booking Amount, Advance, or Security Deposit paid by the Guests and may incur additional charges. These additional services are provided by InstaFarms solely for the convenience of Guests without any obligation or commitment on the part of InstaFarms.

Pricing

The tariffs listed on InstaFarms Booking Channels are non-negotiable and may change without prior notice. All rates are quoted per room or per multiple rooms. The tariffs for Properties may or may not include applicable taxes, depending on the Property type. If a technical glitch results in an inaccurate tariff being displayed, InstaFarms reserves the right to correct the error, and the incorrect tariff will not be enforceable against InstaFarms.

Right of Admission and Possession of Property

By making a Booking, Guests acknowledge and accept that they will never possess or claim possession of any of the Properties booked at any time. Guests will not be allowed to check into the Property at or before the Check-In time unless all prescribed requirements are met. If these requirements are not met, Guests will not be entitled to any refund of the Booking Amount or Deposit, nor will any compensation be due from InstaFarms.

(a) Guests must present the Booking Confirmation issued by InstaFarms along with proof of payment of the entire Booking Amount.

(b) In compliance with government security regulations, every Guest staying at the Properties must provide original government-issued photo IDs for verification, as well as a copy of these IDs, on or before check-in.

(c) Guests must enter the names, addresses, and other details of all guests, including children, in the Guest Register kept at the Property or maintained digitally.

(d) Guests under the age of 18 must be accompanied by at least one adult. If any Guest provides incorrect or false information during Booking, InstaFarms reserves the right to immediately cancel the Booking and deny entry to the Property. If the Guests have already checked in, they may be evicted by InstaFarms representatives. In such cases, the Deposits or Booking Amount paid by the Guests will not be refunded, and no compensation will be provided.

At Check-In or during the stay, the total number of Guests, including visitors, must not exceed the number stated at the time of Booking. InstaFarms may allow additional persons to stay at the Property at its sole discretion and at an additional cost. No extra persons will be permitted without written approval from InstaFarms.

Our Fees

InstaFarms reserves the right to apply additional reservation or facilitation fees at any time without prior notice to Guests.

User Terms

By using this website, you acknowledge that you fully assume all risks associated with the transaction, as well as any liability or harm related to any subsequent activity involving the accommodation that is the subject of the transaction(s).

Links to Other Websites

The website may include links to third-party websites and web pages. InstaFarms does not endorse or represent these websites or their content, and is not responsible for any claims arising from your use of these sites, as InstaFarms has no control over them.

Promotional Offers

By sharing your contact details on the website, you agree to receive promotional content from InstaFarms via WhatsApp, email, push notifications, and SMS. InstaFarms may offer discounts and promotional deals from time to time, which will be subject to specific terms and conditions that may vary. InstaFarms reserves the right to modify or withdraw any promotional offer at any time without prior notice.

Booking Confirmation

Guests understand and agree that payment of the Advance and/or Security Deposit (as determined by InstaFarms) or receipt of a Booking Confirmation indicates that they have read and unconditionally accepted all Booking details and terms. However, a Booking Confirmation does not guarantee a confirmed Booking. InstaFarms is not obligated to fulfill a Booking unless the entire Booking Amount is paid by the Guest through the designated payment method communicated by InstaFarms. If the full Booking Amount is not received by the specified due dates, the Booking Confirmation will be canceled, rendered void, and have no effect.

If a Booking is made through third-party websites, applications, travel agents, advertisements, referrals, or other third parties, the Guest must confirm the Booking with InstaFarms. InstaFarms will not fulfill a Booking unless the full Booking Amount is received, even if a Booking Confirmation has been issued by such third parties or by InstaFarms. Additionally, when booking through third parties, the terms and conditions of those third parties will apply to the Guest and the Booking, alongside the terms and conditions set by InstaFarms. In cases where a third party's terms conflict with InstaFarms' Terms and Conditions, the Terms and Conditions of InstaFarms will take precedence.

Booking on Hold

Upon receiving the Advance and Security Deposit, InstaFarms will place the Booking in a "Booking on Hold" status. The Booking will only be confirmed and served once InstaFarms receives the full Booking Amount through the designated payment method communicated to the Guest. If the full payment is not received by the specified due date through the registered payment method, InstaFarms will not be obligated to fulfill the Booking.

Check-In and Check-Out Timing

The Check-In and Check-Out times are specified in the Booking Confirmation. InstaFarms advises Guests not to arrive before the specified Check-In time, as early arrival may be difficult to accommodate. If Guests arrive and enter the Property before the Check-In time, they may incur additional charges, as determined by InstaFarms. Any changes to the Check-Out time must be approved in writing by InstaFarms. Guests must vacate the Property by the Check-Out time stated in the Booking Confirmation. If they stay beyond this time, additional charges may apply.

Payment of Advances/Security Deposits and Property Damage

To secure a Booking, Guests must pay the Advance before receiving the Booking Confirmation, serving as a security measure to protect InstaFarms against potential revenue loss due to cancellation or non-payment. If the Advance is not received, InstaFarms will not issue a Booking Confirmation.

Guests are responsible for inspecting the Property and reporting any damage within 90 minutes of Check-In. If no report is made within this time, any damage discovered will be assumed to have occurred during the Guest’s stay, and the Guest will be held liable for the cost of repairs.

Guests must use the Property and its furnishings with care. At Check-Out, the Property should be left in good condition, with only normal wear and tear expected. If damage occurs to an item that is part of a set, and an identical replacement is not available, the Guest will be responsible for replacing the entire set.

Guests are not allowed to move or relocate any equipment, furniture, or decor from their original position without prior consent from InstaFarms, except for movable items like chairs.

InstaFarms cannot immediately inspect the Property for damages at the time of Check-Out due to the need to inspect multiple rooms and facilities. The inspection will occur between one Guest’s Check-Out and the next Guest’s Check-In. The Security Deposit, minus any deductions for damages, will be refunded within 30 days of Check-Out. The cost of repairs or replacements will be communicated to the Guests and will be final and binding. If repair costs exceed the Security Deposit, the additional amount will be billed to the Guest, who must pay it within 7 days. Refunds of any remaining Security Deposit will be issued by cheque or bank transfer.

Payment Options

InstaFarms accepts the following registered payment methods:
- Credit/Debit Cards: Payments can be made using Visa, MasterCard, RuPay, American Express, and other cards as listed on the Booking Channels.

- Net Banking: Guests can use their bank's internet banking services for payments. Any fees charged by banks or payment gateways are independent of InstaFarms, and InstaFarms is not liable for these charges.

If payment is not made in full by the Guest, InstaFarms will not be obligated to fulfill the Booking.

Financial Details

You confirm that the credit/debit card or other financial details you provide are accurate and belong to you legally. You agree not to use any financial facility that is not lawfully owned or obtained by you. InstaFarms is not responsible for any fraud related to credit/debit cards; any liability for fraudulent use will be yours, and it will be your responsibility to prove otherwise.

Pets Policy

Pets may be allowed on the Properties at InstaFarms' discretion, which will be specified in the Booking Confirmation. InstaFarms may charge a non-refundable Pet Fee. If you or your visitors bring pets without prior written approval or bring pets other than the approved ones, those pets will not be allowed to enter the Property, and you may be evicted if already checked in. Approved pets must remain on the Property, under the control and supervision of the Guests at all times. Guests are responsible for ensuring that pets do not soil, damage, or spoil the Property or its furnishings. Pets are not allowed in the swimming pool or on furniture. Guests must also ensure that their pets do not cause any nuisance to neighbors or others around the Property.

Breach of Terms

Violation of any terms and conditions will result in immediate termination of the Booking, eviction from the Property, and forfeiture of the entire Booking Amount or any other payments made by the Guest, without any refund.

Cancellations and Refunds

InstaFarms reserves the right to cancel a Booking at any time without prior notice to the Guest. For the latest Cancellation Policy, please visit the Cancellation Policy page.

Safety and Prohibitions

 a. Guests must understand that the Property is a residential area with neighbors living nearby. Guest conduct must not disturb the peace, tranquility, or modesty of the neighbors.

b. The Property is to be used solely for accommodation and not for any other purpose.

c. Guests must not cause any nuisance to neighboring properties.

d. To avoid disturbing neighbors, no loud music should be played in outdoor areas like the poolside, garden, compound, balconies, or terraces.

e. Guests must not use the Property for unlawful or immoral activities. InstaFarms, including its representatives, employees, relatives, or agents, is not liable for any such acts conducted by Guests.

f. Guests must not possess or consume prohibited drugs or organize rave parties in or around the Property. Violating this condition will lead to InstaFarms lodging a Police Complaint against the Guests.

Confidentiality and Personal Data

Any information collected by InstaFarms will be kept confidential according to our Privacy Policy. The following laws and regulations also apply to the use of our Online Booking Channels:

- The Information Technology Act, 2000, concerning the processing of personal data, as amended from time to time.

- The Information Technology (Intermediary Guidelines) Rules, 2011, as amended from time to time.

- The Information Technology (Reasonable Security Practices and Procedures and Sensitive Personal Data or Information) Rules, 2011, as amended from time to time.

Information provided for any Booking made through our Offline Booking Channels will also be kept confidential according to these Terms and Conditions.

Intellectual Property Rights

 Unless otherwise specified, the software necessary for our services, as well as all content, information, and materials available on or used by our Online Booking Channels, are wholly owned by InstaFarms. All rights, titles, and interests in these intellectual properties, including but not limited to developments, proprietary information, trademarks, trade names, logos, artwork, slogans, service marks, domain names, brand names, know-how, processes, methods, trade secrets, designs, and any other copyrightable work, are exclusively vested in InstaFarms.

You are not permitted to copy, scrape, link to, publish, promote, market, integrate, utilize, combine, or otherwise use our content or brand. Should you use or combine our content, or claim any Intellectual Property Rights in the Online Booking Channels, you automatically and irrevocably assign all such rights to InstaFarms. Any unauthorized use or actions will be considered a serious infringement of our Intellectual Property Rights.

Limitation and Liability

Guests acknowledge that InstaFarms functions solely as an online and offline booking platform and will not be held liable in the following situations or similar circumstances:

a) InstaFarms is not liable for any accidents, fires, injuries, or deaths resulting from any incidents, including but not limited to altercations between Guests, caretakers, or other emergency situations at the Property.

b) InstaFarms bears no responsibility for any illegal or hazardous activities conducted by Guests or their companions at the Property, nor for any resulting consequences.

c) InstaFarms is not responsible for any criminal acts, such as discrimination, harassment, theft, murder, kidnapping, drug use, prostitution, or any other unlawful or disruptive behavior involving Guests, their companions, caretakers, or third parties.

d) InstaFarms will not be liable for any structural damages, cracks, leaks, or issues with paintwork, electronic devices, swimming pools, windows, doors, or similar Property-related issues.

Any claims for damages must be reported to InstaFarms immediately and before Check-Out. InstaFarms is not liable for any claims made after Check-Out. In cases where InstaFarms is found to be justifiably responsible for damages related to the services provided, their liability will be limited to the Booking Amount paid by the Guest. The final decision on damage claims rests with InstaFarms.

Guest Issues

Guests must acknowledge that InstaFarms makes every reasonable effort to provide accurate and realistic pictures of the Property. However, if the description or depiction of the Property is found to be materially inaccurate concerning its size, InstaFarms will not be held responsible or liable.

If during the stay, any amenities such as decks, pools, hot tubs, bathrooms, kitchen appliances, or electrical, heating, or air conditioning systems are not as shown in the pictures or are not functioning properly, or if the cleanliness, including bedding and towels, is unsatisfactory, or if there are issues with insects, odors, or deficiencies in services like electricity, gas, water, swimming pool, WiFi, or other amenities, Guests should report these issues to InstaFarms in writing or via phone/WhatsApp within 12 hours of Check-In, providing evidence such as photographs.

InstaFarms will make every effort to resolve these issues, but will not be held responsible or liable if they are not resolved promptly. Guests understand that InstaFarms will not issue refunds or compensation if the issues remain unresolved. InstaFarms' decisions in such matters will be final.

You acknowledge and agree that any issues must not have been directly or indirectly caused by your actions, omissions, or negligence.

If, at the time of your Check-In, the Property is occupied by other visitors, InstaFarms will make reasonable efforts to find and secure an alternative Property for you that is comparable in size, rooms, features, and quality to the one described in your original Booking.

Force Majeure:

You acknowledge and agree that InstaFarms is not liable for any loss or damage incurred during your Booking or while using this website, if such loss arises from a Force Majeure Event. A Force Majeure Event refers to any acts, events, or accidents beyond InstaFarms' control, including but not limited to strikes, lock-outs, utility service failures, transport disruptions, acts of God, wars, riots, civil disturbances, malicious damage, earthquakes, compliance with laws, accidents, machinery breakdowns, fires, floods, storms, epidemics, or pandemics.

Termination:

You understand and agree that InstaFarms reserves the right to terminate your registration and/or your right to use this website for any reason, including but not limited to, any violation of the Privacy Policy or these Terms and Conditions. Such termination may occur without prior notice, and InstaFarms may immediately delete or deactivate your account upon detecting any such violation.

Dispute Resolution and Applicable Law:

Any disputes or claims related to the Booking or arising from it will be referred to arbitration with a sole arbitrator, whose decision will be final and binding. The arbitrator will be mutually appointed by the Parties, and arbitration will take place in Hyderabad, governed by the Indian Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996, as amended. The proceedings will be conducted in English, and Hyderabad courts will have jurisdiction over any matters subject to arbitration.

Assignment:

Bookings made by Guests are non-transferable.

Notices:

Notices or communications from InstaFarms to Guests will be in writing and sent either via email (to the address provided by the Guest) or posted on the Site or Application. Notices sent by email will be deemed received on the date the email is sent.

Indemnification:

 By making a Booking, you assure that it is for private/residential and personal use only, not for commercial purposes or any other purpose. You agree to indemnify and hold InstaFarms harmless from any loss or damage arising from a breach of this assurance, including but not limited to loss of profits, indirect loss, consequential loss, property damage, and reputational harm. Guests also agree to indemnify InstaFarms, its affiliates, employees, officers, and agents from any claims, losses, damages, liabilities, costs, and expenses (including legal fees) arising from misuse of services or violation of the Terms and Conditions.

Feedback:

InstaFarms welcomes your feedback, comments, and suggestions for improving the Site, Application, and Services ("Feedback"). Feedback can be submitted via email.

Waiver:

InstaFarms' failure to exercise or enforce any right or provision of these Terms and Conditions does not constitute a waiver of that right or provision.

Grievance Redressal:

InstaFarms strives to provide high-quality services. If you have any grievances regarding any aspect or feature of the website, you may submit your concerns via email to this id grievance@instafarms.in. All grievances will be addressed promptly.

Submissions:

 Any messages, ideas, suggestions, or other materials you submit through or in connection with this website will become the exclusive property of InstaFarms. By submitting these materials, you agree that InstaFarms has the right to publish them for any purpose, commercial or otherwise, without compensation to you. Additionally, you agree not to submit any materials that infringe upon the rights of any third party, and you accept liability for any damage or injury caused by your submissions, releasing InstaFarms from responsibility.

Miscellaneous:

InstaFarms reserves the right to assign its obligations and duties under these Terms and any related agreements to any person or entity. If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions will continue to be effective.

meta.metaDescription: Booking a farmhouses? Check our terms for a smooth experience. Enjoy stress-free stays, fun events, and unforgettable moments with InstaFarms today!
